message: I don’t think it's fair that I might have to take longer than others just because of my disability.
I don’t either, but they told me that most students take longer than 4 years – more like 5 years to complete their degree.
It sounds like that workshop was useful. Where did you say you went?

Student services.  I can email you a document about the resources they offer for students.  They have a lot of different workshops for students on learning skills plus other resources like counselling.
I’ll also email you a practice exercise they gave me on organizing a weekly timetable.
I’d like that. Good luck with your semester.
